name: Flat Barbell Bench Press
form_cues: Keep feet flat on the floor
Lower the bar to your mid-chest
Press the bar up while keeping shoulders back
common_mistakes: Bouncing the bar off your chest

name: Flat Barbell Bench Press (Standard)
form_cues: Keep feet flat on the floor
Lower the bar to your mid-chest
Press the bar up while keeping shoulders back
common_mistakes: Bouncing the bar off your chest

name: Pause Flat Barbell Bench Press
form_cues: Keep feet flat on the floor
Lower the bar to your mid-chest
Press the bar up while keeping shoulders back
Hold the contraction at the peak for 2 seconds
common_mistakes: Bouncing the bar off your chest

name: Slow Eccentric Flat Barbell Bench Press
form_cues: Keep feet flat on the floor
Lower the bar to your mid-chest
Press the bar up while keeping shoulders back
common_mistakes: Bouncing the bar off your chest

name: Incline Dumbbell Bench Press

name: Pause Incline Dumbbell Bench Press

name: Slow Eccentric Incline Dumbbell Bench Press
